data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Implements encryption for data in transit and at rest to protect user data.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS for data in transit; AES for encrypted storage.

data.title: Secure Access Protocols
data.description: Employs secure protocols to ensure that data access remains confidential and authenticated.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Deploys infrastructure capable of mitigating Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Integrates Google Cloud's DDoS mitigation systems.

data.title: User Privacy Controls
data.description: Provides users with tools to manage privacy settings and content visibility.
data.technical_spec: Continually updated privacy dashboard for user control.

data.title: Malware and Content Filtering
data.description: Utilizes filters to detect and block harmful content and malware.
data.technical_spec: Automated systems with machine learning algorithms for content filtering.
